mapper.select: SELECT * FROM kb_chunk WHERE file_id = #{fileId} ORDER BY chunk_index
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_chunk (file_id, chunk_index, content, source_info, create_time) VALUES (#{fileId}, #{chunkIndex}, #{content}, #{sourceInfo}, NOW())

INSERT INTO kb_chunk (file_id, chunk_index, content, source_info, create_time) VALUES
(#{chunk.fileId}, #{chunk.chunkIndex}, #{chunk.content}, #{chunk.sourceInfo}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT c.* FROM kb_chunk c INNER JOIN kb_file f ON c.file_id = f.id WHERE f.kb_id = #{kbId} AND c.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') LIMIT #{limit}
